title: Create a note from a page element and see it anchored
description: Verifies a user can create a note via the long right-click action and the note appears as a floating overlay anchored to the selected element.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Long right-click and hold on a web page element for 1 second
Choose the create-note option from the appearing menu
Fill Sample note A into the note text input
Confirm note creation
Verify a new floating note overlay is displayed anchored to the selected element

title: Note stays anchored while scrolling
description: Verifies that after creating a note anchored to a page element, scrolling keeps the note positioned relative to that element.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start creating a new anchored note from the current page by invoking the extension's add-note action on a specific page element
Fill in the note text with Smart anchoring scroll test
Confirm note creation
Scroll the page significantly
Verify the note remains visually anchored near the same page element after scrolling

title: Reopen page and see created note reappear on the same element
description: Verifies that a created note persists and automatically reappears when the page is reloaded.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Long right-click and hold on a web page element for 1 second
Choose the create-note option from the appearing menu
Fill Persistence check note into the note text input
Confirm note creation
Reload the page
Verify the previously created note is displayed again anchored to the same element

title: Create note and confirm it stays anchored when scrolling
description: Verifies that after creating a note, scrolling the page keeps the note positioned relative to its target element.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Long right-click and hold on a web page element for 1 second
Choose the create-note option from the appearing menu
Fill Anchoring scroll check into the note text input
Confirm note creation
Scroll the page significantly
Verify the note remains positioned relative to the originally selected element

title: Note remains anchored after page layout change
description: Verifies that after creating a note, changing page layout via normal interaction does not detach the note from its anchored element.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start creating a new anchored note from the current page by invoking the extension's add-note action on a specific page element
Fill in the note text with Smart anchoring layout change test
Confirm note creation
Perform a normal page interaction that changes layout (such as expanding a section, opening an in-page details block, or resizing content within the page)
Verify the note remains positioned relative to its anchored element after the layout change

title: Create note and then find and delete it from the dashboard
description: Verifies a note created on the page is discoverable in All Notes search and can be deleted so it disappears from the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start creating a new anchored note from the current page by invoking the extension's add-note action on a specific page element
Fill in the note text with Dashboard delete journey keyword
Confirm note creation
Open the All Notes view from the main menu
Fill Dashboard delete journey keyword into the search field
Delete the matching note from the results
Verify the deleted note is no longer present in the All Notes results

title: Edit an existing note text and see it saved
description: Verifies a user can edit an existing note inline and the updated text remains displayed after a reload.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Long right-click and hold on a web page element for 1 second
Choose the create-note option from the appearing menu
Fill Original text into the note text input
Confirm note creation
Click the note to focus it
Replace the note text with Updated text after edit
Reload the page
Verify the note displays the updated text

title: Search filters notes by keyword
description: Verifies that searching in All Notes filters the list to matching notes based on text content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start creating a new anchored note from the current page by invoking the extension's add-note action on a specific page element
Fill in the note text with Searchable unique keyword alpha
Confirm note creation
Start creating a new anchored note on another page element
Fill in the note text with Different content beta
Confirm note creation
Open the All Notes view from the main menu
Fill Searchable unique keyword alpha into the search field
Verify only notes matching the search query are shown in the results

title: Change note color and see it persist
description: Verifies a user can change a note’s color and the color remains applied after returning to the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Long right-click and hold on a web page element for 1 second
Choose the create-note option from the appearing menu
Fill Color persistence note into the note text input
Confirm note creation
Click the note to focus it
Select a different note color
Reload the page
Verify the note color matches the newly selected color

title: Multiple notes can be created on the same page
description: Verifies that a user can create more than one anchored note on a page and both remain visible as separate overlays.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start creating a new anchored note from the current page by invoking the extension's add-note action on a specific page element
Fill in the note text with First anchored note
Confirm note creation
Start creating another new anchored note on a different page element
Fill in the note text with Second anchored note
Confirm note creation
Verify two separate note overlays are visible on the page

title: Open a note from results to view details
description: Verifies that selecting a note from the All Notes results opens a detail view for that note.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start creating a new anchored note from the current page by invoking the extension's add-note action on a specific page element
Fill in the note text with Detail view verification note
Confirm note creation
Open the All Notes view from the main menu
Fill Detail view verification note into the search field
Select the matching note from the results
Verify a note details view is displayed for the selected note

title: Toggle storage scope and setting persists on revisit
description: Verifies that changing storage scope between Sync and Local persists when returning to settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /?view=settings
Toggle storage scope to Sync
Navigate to /
Navigate to /?view=settings
Verify the storage scope selection is still set to Sync

title: Empty note text is rejected
description: Verifies that attempting to confirm a new note with empty text is blocked and the note is not created.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start creating a new anchored note from the current page by invoking the extension's add-note action on a specific page element
Leave the note text empty
Confirm note creation
Verify a note validation error is visible and no new note overlay is created

title: Change language and see UI update in settings
description: Verifies that switching between Swedish and English updates the settings UI language accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /?view=settings
Select Swedish as the language
Verify the settings UI displays Swedish labels
Select English as the language
Verify the settings UI displays English labels

title: All Notes shows an empty state when no results match
description: Verifies that an unmatched search query results in an empty state rather than stale results.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the All Notes view from the main menu
Fill a query that is unlikely to match any note into the search field
Verify an empty state is displayed indicating no notes match the search

title: Export notes generates a JSON download
description: Verifies that exporting from settings produces a JSON file download representing current notes.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start creating a new anchored note from the current page by invoking the extension's add-note action on a specific page element
Fill in the note text with Export includes this note
Confirm note creation
Navigate to /?view=settings
Trigger export to download a JSON backup
Verify a JSON backup file download is initiated

title: Import rejects malformed or non-JSON file
description: Verifies that importing an invalid file shows a validation error and does not import notes.

steps.description: Navigate to /?view=settings
Attempt to import a malformed or non-JSON file via the import control
Verify a validation error is visible and the import is rejected
